settings.title: Classic Ceremonial Cacao Drink
settings.description: A warm, grounding chocolate elixir to start your day with sustained, crash-free energy.
settings.ingredients:
2 tbsp Cacao Sense Cacao Powder
1 cup warm oat milk (or milk of choice)
1 tsp honey or maple syrup
Pinch of cinnamon
Pinch of sea salt
settings.method:
Warm the oat milk gently over low heat — do not boil.
Whisk in the cacao powder until smooth and glossy.
Add honey, cinnamon and sea salt; whisk again.
Pour into your favourite mug and sip slowly. Pure ritual.
settings.tip: For a frothy finish, blend for 10 seconds before serving.

settings.title: Silky Dark Chocolate Ganache
settings.description: Two ingredients, endless uses — glaze cakes, fill tarts, or dip fruit.
settings.ingredients:
200g Cacao Sense Cacao Wafers
200ml warm cream (or coconut cream)
settings.method:
Place cacao wafers in a heatproof bowl.
Heat cream until just steaming, then pour over the wafers.
Let sit 2 minutes, then stir slowly from the centre until silky and glossy.
Use warm as a glaze, or chill to pipe and fill.
settings.tip: Add a pinch of sea salt for depth.

settings.title: Cacao Nib Energy Granola
settings.description: Crunchy, nutrient-dense, and naturally sweet — nature's chocolate chips baked into your morning.
settings.ingredients:
2 cups rolled oats
½ cup Cacao Sense Cacao Nibs
⅓ cup honey
¼ cup coconut oil, melted
½ cup mixed nuts
Pinch of salt
settings.method:
Preheat oven to 160°C (320°F).
Mix oats, nuts and salt. Stir in honey and melted coconut oil.
Spread on a lined tray and bake 20 minutes, stirring once.
Cool completely, then fold in cacao nibs so they stay crunchy and raw.
settings.tip: Store in an airtight jar for up to two weeks.

settings.title: Soothing Cacao Husk Tea
settings.description: A caffeine-light, earthy brew made from sun-dried cacao husks — perfect for winding down.
settings.ingredients:
2 tbsp Cacao Sense Cacao Tea
2 cups water
Honey or orange peel (optional)
settings.method:
Bring water to a gentle simmer.
Add cacao tea and steep 5–7 minutes.
Strain into a cup. Add honey or a twist of orange peel.
Sip warm and unwind.
settings.tip: Steep longer for a richer, fuller body.

settings.title: Whipped Cacao Butter Body Balm
settings.description: Not everything cacao goes in a bowl — this luxurious balm is nature's purest moisturiser.
settings.ingredients:
½ cup Cacao Sense Cacao Butter
2 tbsp coconut oil
5 drops essential oil (optional)
settings.method:
Melt cacao butter and coconut oil gently over a water bath.
Remove from heat and cool until slightly firm.
Whip with a hand mixer until light and fluffy.
Spoon into a jar. Apply to skin for deep, lasting moisture.
settings.tip: Store in a cool place to keep the whipped texture.

settings.title: Raw Cacao Bean Trail Mix
settings.description: A magnesium-rich, energising snack for recovery and focus.
settings.ingredients:
½ cup Cacao Sense Cacao Beans
½ cup almonds
¼ cup dried cherries
¼ cup pumpkin seeds
settings.method:
Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
Toss and portion into jars or pouches.
Grab and go for natural energy that lasts.
settings.tip: Crack the beans lightly to release their full aroma.

settings.subtext: From morning rituals to evening indulgence — discover simple, nourishing ways to bring pure single-origin cacao into your kitchen. Every recipe uses 100% pure Cacao Sense products: no additives, no shortcuts, just real chocolate flavour.
